name: INSULET CORP
summary: PART I Overview Insulet Corporation (we or the Company) is primarily engaged in the development, manufacture, and sale of its proprietary continuous insulin delivery systems for people with insulin-dependent diabetes. The Omnipod platform includes: the Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System (Omnipod 5), the Omnipod DASH Insulin Management System (Omnipod DASH), and the Omnipod Insulin Management System (Classic Omnipod).
